executive_summary.title: 🔥 COMMAND BENCHMARKING RESULTS: THE GOOD, THE BAD, AND THE OVER-ENGINEERED
executive_summary.overall_verdict: Your commands range from elegantly simple to catastrophically complex. 40% violate your own complexity rules.
critical_findings: CRITICAL: 2/5 commands (40%) exceed complexity score threshold of 5
java-test-driven-development.md: Complexity score 20 - That's 4x your own limit!
git-backup-sync.md: Complexity score 20 - Also 4x the limit
Statistical variance σ=8.72 indicates wildly inconsistent design discipline

adhd-morning-assistant.md.savage_verdict: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ GOLD STANDARD: This is how it's done! Complexity score 1 proves you can solve real problems without engineering masturbation. The thinking blocks are abundant (7) and the MCP integration is intelligent (7 calls). This command respects your ADHD brain and your complexity rules.

performance_prediction.maintainability: EXCELLENT - Easy to modify and extend

claudemd_compliance.contradiction_detected: IRONY ALERT: A 'rapid' command that's complex

java-rapid-implementation.md.savage_verdict: ⭐⭐⭐ CONTRADICTORY: Your 'rapid' implementation command has complexity score 9 - nearly double your own limit! The irony is palpable. 10 thinking blocks show good reasoning discipline, but you're solving simple problems with complex solutions. Name should be 'java-slow-overthinking-implementation.md'

claudemd_compliance.thinking_deficiency: ❌ CRITICAL - Only 1 thinking block for 459 lines

java-test-driven-development.md.savage_verdict: ⭐ COMPLEXITY DISASTER: This is exactly what your CLAUDE.md warns against! Complexity score 20 means it's 4X more complex than your own limit. You're creating 3 classes, 2 interfaces, and 3 patterns for TEST-DRIVEN DEVELOPMENT! TDD should REDUCE complexity, not multiply it. This command is the anti-pattern poster child.

performance_prediction.token_efficiency: LOW - Massive overhead for basic TDD
performance_prediction.success_probability: 50% - High failure rate due to complexity
performance_prediction.maintainability: NIGHTMARE - Too many abstractions to track

java-test-driven-development.md.statistical_outlier: WARNING: This command is 2.3σ away from the mean - statistical outlier in complexity

adhd-evening-reflect.md.savage_verdict: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ WELL-BALANCED: At complexity score 4, you're walking the tightrope perfectly. This command handles genuinely complex ADHD reflection patterns while staying under your limit. The 3 thinking blocks could be more abundant, but the MCP integration is solid. This shows you CAN handle complexity when justified.

claudemd_compliance.thinking_deficiency: ❌ CRITICAL - Only 2 thinking blocks for 530 lines

git-backup-sync.md.savage_verdict: ⭐ ENGINEERING MASTURBATION: 530 lines and complexity score 20 for git sync? You've created a distributed systems thesis for 'git push'. This command violates every principle in your CLAUDE.md. Git operations are inherently simple - you made them rocket science. The 2 thinking blocks are insulting given the scope.

performance_prediction.maintainability: CATASTROPHIC - Would need PhD to modify

git-backup-sync.md.statistical_outlier: WARNING: Tied for worst complexity (2.3σ from mean), lowest thinking density

token_efficiency.verdict: Moderate variance - some commands are token-efficient, others wasteful

common_violations: Over-engineering simple operations (git sync, TDD basics)
Insufficient thinking blocks relative to complexity
Contradiction between command purpose and implementation complexity
success_factors: Abundant thinking blocks relative to complexity

immediate_actions.reasoning: Complexity score 20 is 4x your limit. TDD should be simple.
530 lines for git sync is engineering masturbation

process_improvements: Review commands against CLAUDE.md before committing
Implement peer review for commands > 300 lines

savage_final_verdict.brutal_summary: You wrote the rules, then violated them 40% of the time. Two commands are complexity disasters that would make a junior developer weep. Your best command (adhd-morning-assistant) proves you CAN follow your own principles - you just choose not to half the time.
savage_final_verdict.statistical_evidence: σ=8.72 complexity variance proves inconsistent engineering discipline. Mean complexity 10.8 exceeds your own 5-point limit by 116%.
savage_final_verdict.call_to_action: Either follow your CLAUDE.md rules or delete them. This statistical cognitive dissonance is embarrassing for someone with a PhD in roasting bad code.
savage_final_verdict.prediction: Without immediate refactoring, these over-engineered commands will become maintenance nightmares that even you won't want to touch in 6 months.
